description: The Google Search homepage loads from a blank state.
frame_description: The screen transitions from a blank white state to the Google Search homepage.

description: A task instruction overlay appears on the screen, detailing the research objective regarding home loan options.
frame_description: A large white modal with text 'Task' and research instructions covers the Google homepage.

description: User navigates from the task instructions page to the Google search homepage to begin the research task.
frame_description: The screen transitions from a task instruction modal to the Google search homepage.

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 8.6, uniformity: 0.71)
User clicked the 'home loans comparison' autocomplete suggestion in the Google search bar.
frame_description: Google search page with autocomplete dropdown visible and cursor over the first suggestion.

description: The page navigated from the Google search homepage to the search results for 'home loans comparison'.
frame_description: Transition from search input to search results page.

description: User moved the cursor to hover over the 'Unloan' sponsored search result link.
interaction_target: 5.10% p.a. Comparison Rate | Low Rate Home Loan From Unloan
frame_description: Zoomed view of search results showing the cursor moving onto a sponsored link.

description: User hovers the cursor over the Unloan sponsored result URL link.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the Unloan website link in the sponsored results section.

description: Scroll up (magnitude: 12.4, uniformity: 0.72)
User hovers over the 'Calculators' link in the navigation menu.
frame_description: The user's cursor is positioned over the 'Calculators' option in the header navigation bar.

description: The 'Savings' calculator section loads and displays input fields for loan purpose, amount, and term.
User navigates from the Unloan calculator page to the task instructions screen.
User clicks on the loan balance input field to focus it.
frame_description: The input field for loan balance becomes focused with a blue border.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button to proceed to the next step of the application.
frame_description: The user clicks the green NEXT button, and the page transitions to the interest rate question.

description: User clicks on the 'Estimate interest rate' input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves into the interest rate input field.

description: User toggles the 'I don't know, skip' switch for the interest rate.
frame_description: The toggle switch changes from grey (off) to green (on).

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 17.9, uniformity: 0.69)
User clicks on the 'Search for your lender' input field, which displays a validation error.
interaction_target: Search for your lender input field
frame_description: The lender search field is focused, and a red validation message 'Current lender is required' appears.

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 13.4, uniformity: 0.70)
Scroll E (magnitude: 13.4, uniformity: 0.70)
User clicked the 'NEXT' button to proceed from the property value screen.
frame_description: The user is on a screen asking for estimated property value and clicks the green 'NEXT' button.

description: User selected 'Decrease repayments' as the reason for refinancing.
frame_description: The user selects the first option 'Decrease repayments' from a list of reasons for refinancing.

description: The application navigates to the next question about property usage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the refinance reason question to a question about how the property will be used.

description: User clicked 'I will live in it' to specify property usage, triggering a page transition.
frame_description: The user selects the 'I will live in it' option, and the screen begins to transition.

description: The page loads the next step asking about important lender features after a brief loading state.
frame_description: A loading spinner is briefly visible before the new question about lender features appears.

description: User selected 'Offset/Redraw' as an important feature when choosing a lender.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Offset/Redraw' icon/button, which then navigates to the credit history question.

description: User clicked 'Excellent - No Issues' to describe their credit history, moving to the employment status screen.
frame_description: The user selects the 'Excellent - No Issues' option, and the screen changes to ask about employment status.

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 6.5, uniformity: 0.76)
User clicks the primary action button at the bottom of the form to proceed, triggering a page load and transition to a blank state.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the interest rate details form to a blank white screen, indicating navigation.

description: User scrolls down the Google search results page to view more listings.
User clicks on the 'Compare Home Loans for 2026 (Interest Rates from 5.09%)' search result link, triggering a page navigation.
interaction_target: Compare Home Loans for 2026 (Interest Rates from 5.09%)
frame_description: The screen goes white as the browser begins to load the destination page.

description: User scrolls down the list of home loan products to view more options.

description: User hovers the cursor over the '5.19% p.a.' interest rate for a Newcastle Permanent Fixed home loan product.
User continues scrolling down the page to see further loan results.
User moves the cursor towards the 'Enquire' button on the first home loan card.

description: User hovered over the 'Compare' menu item in the navigation bar.

description: User clicked the 'Next' button to navigate to the next page of home loan results, triggering a page load.

description: The screen transitions from a blank white page to a loading screen featuring a meerkat illustration.

description: The loading process completes, and the user is navigated to the first question of the flow: 'How can we help you?'.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'I want to refinance' option, which highlights with a blue border.

description: User clicks on the 'I want to refinance' option, triggering a transition to the next step in the process.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the details of the ANZ Standard Variable Rate Home Loan.

description: User scrolls further down the page to view the 'Request a call back' button and 'Learn more' link.

description: User scrolls down the page from the 'What is a variable rate home loan?' section to view the interest rates and 'Request a call back' button.
